title: linum austriacum var. glaucescens
intro: Linum austriacum var. glaucescens is a plant species of the genus Linum, commonly known as the Austrian flax or blue flax, a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Linum austriacum var. glaucescens include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Linum austriacum var. glaucescens include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
